entity.summary: South Korea-based centralized exchange launched in October 2014 and still operating under the Coinone brand.
entity.notes: Launch timing corrected from 2015 to October 2014 based on Coinone official materials.

expected.summary: South Korea-based centralized exchange launched in 2015 and still operating under the Coinone brand.

changes.summary: South Korea-based centralized exchange launched in October 2014 and still operating under the Coinone brand.
changes.notes: Launch timing corrected from 2015 to October 2014 based on Coinone official materials.

events.title: Coinone entered the South Korean exchange market
events.description: Coinone began operating in South Korea's virtual-currency exchange market in October 2014.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker based on Coinone's official retrospective notice; the exact launch day is not asserted.

events.title: Coinone's virtual-asset service provider filing was accepted
events.description: Coinone announced that South Korean authorities had accepted its virtual-asset service provider filing under the revised financial-transaction framework.
events.notes: The acceptance allowed Coinone to continue operating within South Korea's registered VASP framework.

evidence.title: Coinone official notice dated 2017-10-23
evidence.notes: The official notice states that Coinone entered the South Korean exchange market in October 2014.

evidence.title: Coinone CGEX launch announcement
evidence.notes: The official announcement says Coinone had accumulated about four years of experience in the South Korean market by October 2018, corroborating the 2014 start year.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Coinone
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Coinone identity, South Korean domain, and continuing market activity.

evidence.title: Coinone VASP filing acceptance notice
evidence.notes: Official Coinone notice records acceptance of its virtual-asset service provider filing.
